speaker: Director
en: Good morning.

speaker: Director
en: Welcome to the Early Learning Childcare Centre.

speaker: Director
en: How can I help you?

speaker: Man
en: Good morning.

speaker: Man
en: I came across the advertisement for your childcare centre last week, and I'm calling to get some details.

speaker: Man
en: I'm thinking of enrolling my daughter.

speaker: Director
en: OK.

speaker: Director
en: What do you want to know, sir?

speaker: Man
en: Well, I've learnt from the brochure that there are different types of caring, and I'm interested in the short-day one.

speaker: Man
en: How much is the cost?

speaker: Director
en: Well, it depends on the age of your child.

speaker: Director
en: For children over the age of two, we charge 30 dollars a day, and for those younger than two, you have to pay 37.50 dollars.

speaker: Man
en: Does it include meals?

speaker: Director
en: Well, I'm afraid not.

speaker: Director
en: You have to pay extra for them.

speaker: Director
en: But we offer you free care for 20 hours weekly.

speaker: Director
en: It used to be 10 hours, but this month, we extended the length of time as a special offer for our clients.

speaker: Man
en: Oh, that will be of great help.

speaker: Man
en: OK, that's about the fee.

speaker: Man
en: Then may I know more about your centre, something about the children's activities, the staff etc.?

speaker: Director
en: OK.

speaker: Director
en: We offer a diversity of indoor activities, which cater for children of different ages, for example, paintings with watercolours, singing, dancing, games etc.

speaker: Director
en: Moreover, when the weather is good, we always take children to our playground and organize different programmes in the open air.

speaker: Man
en: That's great!

speaker: Man
en: Outdoor activities are essential for children.

speaker: Man
en: What about the teachers?

speaker: Man
en: Are they experienced?

speaker: Director
en: Of course!

speaker: Director
en: All teachers in our centre have relevant working experience of at least three years and specialize in primary school education.

speaker: Man
en: Great!

speaker: Man
en: Then they must be professional in dealing with children.

speaker: Man
en: Another thing is, I've heard from other parents that they can receive a report from their caring centres every weekend about how their children perform during that week, and I wonder, is there anything like that in your centre?

speaker: Director
en: Yes, we provide that too.

speaker: Man
en: Great!

speaker: Man
en: Then I want to enrol my daughter as soon as possible.

speaker: Director
en: Well, I'm afraid we have no vacancy at the moment, and you can't join until the beginning of September because one child will finish caring at the end of August.

speaker: Man
en: I see.

speaker: Director
en: Then I will talk about our staff.

speaker: Director
en: All of our centre's members are well trained so that they will take care of your children in every aspect.

speaker: Director
en: For example, when doing activities with special needs, our staff will prepare all the necessities for children, like aprons in the painting class, sunglasses and sun cream when playing outside in a sunny day.

speaker: Man
en: It's great that you can consider that.

speaker: Man
en: I thought we had to prepare for these by ourselves.

speaker: Director
en: You must provide something - a family photo.

speaker: Director
en: Many children may miss their parents, especially during the first week, so our staff will take photos of every child in case they need them.

speaker: Man
en: Right.

speaker: Man
en: Apart from the professional knowledge of caring, are there any other requirements for your staff?

speaker: Director
en: Well, actually, when we do the recruitment, the priority we consider is the general health of the staff, so each applicant must provide a health certificate from the doctor.

speaker: Man
en: Yes, I agree it's essential.

speaker: Man
en: I've learned about your centre and am pretty interested.

speaker: Man
en: But I still have to discuss it with my wife.

speaker: Director
en: Of course.

speaker: Director
en: Then I'll give you the contact detail of our centre, and if you want to register, you can call us or even have a visit if you like.

speaker: Man
en: OK.

speaker: Man
en: What's your address?

speaker: Director
en: It's NO.75, Calliope Avenue, that's C-A-double L-I-O-P-E, Walkley.

speaker: Man
en: OK, NO.75, Calliope Avenue.

speaker: Director
en: And the telephone number is 4789 6354.

speaker: Man
en: OK.

speaker: Man
en: That's everything I want to know.

speaker: Man
en: Thank you very much.

speaker: Director
en: You are welcome!

speaker: Director
en: Bye!

speaker: Man
en: Bye!
